Introducing $SATO Airdrop

The mother of the two icons, Doge and Neiro 🧡

Sato is a project that honors Atsuko Sato herself, the compassionate heart behind the iconic Dogecoin and Neiro. While many tokens are built on the fame of her pets, SATO focuses on the woman who made it all possible. Atsuko’s life is a testament to the power of love and kindness, and SATO is a way for the world to give back, ensuring her legacy of compassion endures.

As the project grows, SATO will make meaningful donations to community-chosen charities in Atsuko’s name, continuing her spirit of compassion to inspire and make a difference.

CLAIM $SATO NOW

hOW TO CLAIM AIRDROP

Follow these easy steps to claim and participate in the ongoing $SATO Airdrop.

1

Connect a Wallet

Connect MetaMask or your preferred wallet.

2

Get Some ETH

Ensure your wallet has ETH for gass fee to claim $SATO airdrop. Buy ETH on MetaMask, transfer from another wallet, or send from an exchange.

3

APPROVAL

Connect your wallet and approve to claim $SATO token Airdrop.

4

$SATO Airdrop

Hurrray!, You've successfully claim $SATO token.

CLAIM AIRDROP

Timeline

Jan 2021
Landed our first project of the year.
Off to a great start!
Apr 2021
Closed 2 massive projects with a $20 million funded start-up in London
Sept 2021
ViDesigns is officially a limited company!! We're legit now!
21 Oct 2021
FINALLY a Webflow Expert!! After 1.5 years with over 60+ Webflow projects!
Dec 2021
Closing the year with 4X sales from 2020 and added 2 new team members!
Made with 💪 by ViDesigns
Feb 2021
3 simultaneous projects while finishing up final year at university...
May 2021
We built a HUGE webapp for an office listing start-up using just no-code tools!
20 Oct 2021
Finally graduated! 4 years went by too fast and too slow at the same time.
Nov 2021
We had our FIRST ever 5-figure month & 6 simultaneous projects! 

Tokenomics

0% TAX

No fees applied to buying, selling, or transferring $SATO!

Contract Renounced

$SATO owner has given up control over it. By the people. For the people.

LP Burned

Liquidity Provider (LP) tokens permanently removed from circulation.

Official Links

$SATO is a meme coin and a highly speculative investment. Its value is driven by market sentiment, hype, and social media trends, and it carries a high degree of risk. Before you invest in $SATO, please carefully consider the following: Volatility: Meme coin prices can fluctuate wildly, leading to significant potential losses. Limited Use Case:  Many meme coins have limited real-world applications, and their value depends heavily on speculation. Unregulated Market: The cryptocurrency market is largely unregulated, which increases investment risk. This is not financial advice. You should do your own research and consult with a financial advisor before making any investment decisions. We are not responsible for any losses incurred as a result of investing in $SATO.
